commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Rightfully. According to the law, which decides that, if the first-born be deformed, the next shall succeed, chap. xxi. 18. Hebrew, "the priest, of his sons, who is anointed in his stead, shall offer it. "No mention is made of its being hot, either here or in the Septuagint. (Haydock)
